name: Frozen Kahlua Cake
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 325°F. Grease and flour a bundt pan. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy. Add cocoa powder and egg yolks, mixing well. Dissolve baking soda in water, then combine with coffee and Kahlúa; mix into batter alternately with flour. Fold in vanilla extract and stiffly beaten egg whites. Pour batter into prepared pan, removing any air bubbles. Bake for 1 hour. Combine glaze ingredients and pour over warm cake. Cover and freeze. About 1 hour before serving, remove from freezer and frost with whipped cream.
